description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The structure is surrounded by a paved driveway and a small parking area, with several palm trees and coniferous trees dotting the perimeter. The building features large windows and multiple entry points, including a prominent main entrance connected by a walkway. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray concrete or stucco, with darker accents around the windows and doors. A blue vehicle is parked on one side, and the property is enclosed by a low fence, giving it a suburban residential feel.
description: A modern, flat-roofed single-story bungalow with large windows, a paved driveway, and surrounding trees, finished in light gray with dark accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance walkway, several palm trees, and the overall rectangular layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue vehicle, additional palm trees, and the extended driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the parking area, more trees, and the back facade with grouped windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway extension, a circular feature (possibly a fountain), and the side entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
